form.formComment: Comes here second-up after three weeks. Lacklustre first-up performance when 9th (Fr4) over 1684m after racing wide at Pinjarra beaten 40 m by Gelsomino Amal (2:04.40) in 4yo+ 1-3 WINs M on March 23 at $9. Hard to make a case in this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Comes here second-up after three weeks. Lacklustre first-up performance when 9th (Fr4) over 1684m after racing wide at Pinjarra beaten 40 m by Gelsomino Amal (2:04.40) in 4yo+ 1-3 WINs M on March 23 at $9. Hard to make a case in this field.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait leaving the back straight on the first occasion.
Hung out and raced roughly passing the 175m.
Tightened approaching the 1500m. Broke on two occasions clear of interference.
Approaching the 200m broke gait free of interference.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 6th (Fr3) over 1730m at this track, beaten 30 m by From Tigerland (2:04.80) in 4yo+ 0-2 WINs on April 7 at $12. Two runs back was driven from back in the field when 10th (Fr8) over 2130m at this track, beaten 55 m by The Swindler (2:35.60) in 4yo+ 0W/17 0K stake M on March 13 at $126. Needs to lift.

form.formComment: Last start posted a big 7 m win as favourite (Fr5) at Pinjarra (2:39.00) beating Blitzar in 4yo+ NR 55 to 61 on March 30 at $1.14. Strips fitter third-up and can repeat the dose.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start posted a big 7 m win as favourite (Fr5) at Pinjarra (2:39.00) beating Blitzar in 4yo+ NR 55 to 61 on March 30 at $1.14. Strips fitter third-up and can repeat the dose.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 12th (Fr2) over 2130m after showing early pace at this track beaten 40 m by Art Ideal (2:35.70) in 4yo+ NR up to 65 GH on April 10 at $26. Before that 4th (Sr5) over 2100m at Bunbury beaten 12 m by Brought To Light (2:35.10) in 4yo+ NR up to 59 on April 4 at $126. Unlikely to threaten in this tougher assignment.

formComments.comment: Didn't do much last start, 12th (Fr2) over 2130m after showing early pace at this track beaten 40 m by Art Ideal (2:35.70) in 4yo+ NR up to 65 GH on April 10 at $26. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait during the score up and out of position when the start was effected.

form.formComment: Last preparation only had 2 starts before going for a break. Returned to racing with a big 17 m win as favourite when quickly away, (Fr7) at this track (2:05.80) beating Lets Rattlnroll in 4yo+ MAIDEN on April 7 at $2.30. Hard to beat on his latest effort.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 2130m at this track, beaten 12 m by Sammy Suffarell (2:38.50) in 4yo+ 0-2 WINs on March 31 at $3.60. At his previous start good run when 3rd (Fr1) over 2190m at Northam beaten 6 m by Il Bandito (2:48.00) in 4yo+ NR 45 to 56 on March 20 at $3.40. Capable of going well on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 2130m at this track, beaten 12 m by Sammy Suffarell (2:38.50) in 4yo+ 0-2 WINs on March 31 at $3.60. At his previous start good run when 3rd (Fr1) over 2190m at Northam beaten 6 m by Il Bandito (2:48.00) in 4yo+ NR 45 to 56 on March 20 at $3.40. Capable of going well on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait racing out of the back straight on the first occasion.
Hung inwards making the turn into the front straight in the final occasion.

form.formComment: Two back was fourth after showing early speed, behind Captain Stirling at Pinjarra over 2185m in a 4yo+ 2-4 WINs on March 23 at $21. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Sammy Suffarell at this track over 2130m in a 4yo+ 0-2 WINs on March 31 at $3.50. Among the leading chances.

Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Sammy Suffarell at this track over 2130m in a 4yo+ 0-2 WINs on March 31 at $3.50. Among the leading chances.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run she then managed to finish seventh over 2130m at this track last time out. Can open the campaign with a forward performance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: First up. At the last run she then managed to finish seventh over 2130m at this track last time out. Can open the campaign with a forward performance.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Sr3) over 1730m at this track, beaten 25 m by From Tigerland (2:04.80) in 4yo+ 0-2 WINs on April 7 at $41. Two runs back failed to finish when he ran at Wagin on April 2 over 1776m. This looks a far sterner task.

Broke gait in the back straight on the final occasion.
